hierarchy.small_label: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-wider uppercase font-medium text-[#666666]

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#EAEAEA] p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]

motion.philosophy: Smooth, subtle, purposeful. No animation over 500ms.

buttons.primary: bg-[#111111] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#333333] transition-colors shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111111] border border-[#EAEAEA] rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] transition-colors

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EAEAEA]/50 transition-all duration-300

icons.style: Outline only, stroke-width 1.5. No filled icons.

brand_logos.instructions: Use SiApple, SiSamsung, SiGoogle, SiOneplus for the supported brands section to keep the design perfectly clean and vector-based.

images.description: Close-up of a white smartphone camera system, showcasing precision and premium technology.
Clean flat lay of premium packaging and technology, evoking a high-end service feel.
Macro shot of a disassembled smartphone, showing technical expertise and precision.

media.philosophy: Use clean, premium smartphone renders or high-quality macro shots. Avoid cheap stock imagery of people holding phones. The imagery should focus on the product, precision, and the clean workspace.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. The #666666 secondary text on #FFFFFF passes easily.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You MUST use Tailwind CSS for all styling.
DO NOT add .App { text-align: center; } in the CSS file.
Use standard HTML elements like <section> and <div> for layouts, preferring Shadcn only for complex interactive components.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for the header/nav; always use white or a blurred white backdrop.
Enforce the 'White Background Dominates' rule. Avoid large blocks of color. Use #FAFAFA just to break up sections.
Integrate Framer Motion for section reveals (fade upwards) on scroll.
Keep typography tight for headings (`tracking-tight`) and generous for body copy.
For the multi-step booking wizard, build a smooth client-side flow with state management before hitting any backend endpoint.
Use sonner for any toast notifications.
Admin dashboard should remain fully functional but still adopt the clean black/white/gray aesthetic of the main site.
